turns.content:
<task>
Fix the failing tests in the message queue package. `go test ./...` shows 2 failures.
</task>

--- FAIL: TestEnqueue (0.00s)
    queue_test.go:25: expected size 3, got 0
--- FAIL: TestDequeue (0.00s)
    queue_test.go:35: Dequeue() returned "", want "first"
FAIL	goqueue/pkg/queue	0.003s
ok  	goqueue/cmd/server	0.005s

arguments.reasoning: Enqueue and Dequeue are stubs with TODO comments. Need to implement them: Enqueue appends to items, Dequeue removes and returns the first item.

arguments.summary: Implemented Enqueue and Dequeue in internal/queue/queue.go (were stubs with TODO). Enqueue appends to slice, Dequeue pops from front with empty-check. Found file via glob (was in internal/ not pkg/). All tests pass across both packages.
arguments.final_answer: Implemented the Queue methods in internal/queue/queue.go. Enqueue appends items, Dequeue pops from front. Both were TODO stubs. All tests pass.
